titleStmt.title: SII 25.17: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 17. (A.R. No. 17 of 1908.) DĀRĀŚURAM, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the first prākāra in the Airāvatēśvara temple and now at the right of entrance in the same temple.

This damaged inscription may be assigned on palaeographical grounds to 13th Century and records the grant of income from taxes on the trees in the temple gardens deposited in cash in the Rājarājaṉ treasury (Rājarājaṉ-karuvūgalam) (-Karuvūlagam) for food-offerings to the deity in the temple. The gardens in the Rājarāja-viḷāgam were stated to have been destroyed due to some calamity and the revival of the gardens was arranged for, in a specialised manner with provision of some exemption (details not clear) in the same area (viḷāgam).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sva tikaḷ śrī rājarāja tevarkku yāṇṭu Irupattoṉṟāvatu Uṭaiyār Irājarājiśvara muṭaiyār tirunāmattukkāṇi palauḷavai rājarāWritten by symbols. ja viḷākam kiḻ kūṟṟilum mel kūṟṟilum rājarājaWritten by symbols.ṉ tiruppatiyilūṭṭu viḷākattilum niṉṟa teṅkum māvum puḷiyum Uḷḷiṭṭa maraṅkaḷ turitamāṉa nāḷile veṭṭuṇṭum viḻuntum Aḻivupaṭukaiyil
ka ṅkaḷ ṭayeyum kaivilaikoṇṭu potukaiyil Ittirunta vaṉaṅkaḷil kuṭimakkaḷait teṅkum maramumRead māvumUḷḷiṭṭaṉa vaikka coḻa ṉ Iṭattu Irupatāvatu varaiyum Iṟuttu vantapaṭi Iṟukkap paṟṟāteṉṟum Iṟukkalāmpaṭi niccayittu Ippaṭikku kalveṭṭit taril
lū� paṭiyaiyRead paṭiyerājarājaWritten by symbols.p pāṇṭi nāṭṭu miḻalaik kūṟṟattuThe words ceyvitta and ••• k kaṟkuṭi are written above and below this word.kaḻaṉivāyiluṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ niṉṟalāki Āṭuvārāṉa pottappic coḻar ṇṇappañceytu Irupattoṉṟāvatu mutal vaiykkalā maraṅkaḷ vaiykkavum vaiytta marattil teṅkum palāvum nikki
kaḷukku t Ippaṭiye Iṟukkavum teṅkukaḷukku teṅku Oṉṟukku kāykkapukka Āṇṭu mutal Irupattañcāka vanta teṅkāy Eṇṇavum palā Oṉṟukku Āṟākavanta palākkāy mutal koḷḷavum Itile Amutu paṭikku nāṟcāṇ cuṟṟile Iraṇṭu palāppaḻam Iṭavum nikkiniṉṟa palākkāy nālu
nālukkum palākkāy Oṉṟukku kaṭavatāka vanta kācu Irācarācak karuvu(ka)lattile Oṭukkavum kaṭavatāka nāyaṉār tiruvuḷḷamāṉamaiyil teṅkum palāvum Uḷḷiṭṭa maraṅkaḷ vaittu Ippaṭi Iṟukka kaṭavarkaḷāka paṇṇuvittu ce cantiraciṅkaṉ tirunantavaṉamum koṭṭaiyūr tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāṉa tirunanta vaṉaṅkaḷumIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 25.17 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
